summary:
Recovery: Good

Reading: State
Good
Recovery 64 • Sleep 76 • Strain 57%

Read
Recovery is carrying better than recent days, while output has run lighter than a usual day and effort spent remains moderate. This window favors measured strength work over chasing volume; muscle protection still depends on the protein side catching up before the deficit gets too sharp.

Measured strength, quiet reserve.

Performance: Measured strength, quiet reserve.

Transit: none
